header.title: Vehicle Asset History
header.subtitle: Per-vehicle replacement history, misuse risk scoring, and red flag detection

table.noMatch: No vehicles match the current filters.
table.showingOf: Showing 200 of {count} vehicles - use filters to narrow results

recommendations.serialReuse: Investigate tyre movement records. Verify physical tyre identity across assets. May indicate theft or data fraud.
recommendations.duplicateEntry: Review data entry procedures. Remove duplicate record and confirm which entry is accurate.
recommendations.shortInterval: Review driver behaviour and road conditions. Early failure may indicate misuse, overloading, or improper fitment.
recommendations.sameDayBurst: Verify incident report. Bulk same-day replacements may indicate genuine emergency or fraudulent batch entry.
recommendations.rapidRecurrence: Investigate asset operating conditions. Recurrent high-risk failures suggest systematic misuse or equipment issue.
recommendations.costSpike: Verify invoice. Compare against supplier rate card. May indicate billing error or procurement issue.
recommendations.lowKmUsage: Physical inspection recommended. Extremely low mileage before removal is a strong indicator of tyre theft.
recommendations.inconsistentKm: Audit odometer readings. Non-sequential km may indicate tampering, odometer rollback, or data entry error.
recommendations.budgetBreach: Review monthly spend against approved budget. Escalate to procurement if systematic. Update budget in Fleet Master if policy has changed.
recommendations.lowKmVsPolicy: Tyre was removed well below the expected km threshold in Fleet Master. Investigate for premature failure, misuse, or incorrect odometer data.

redFlagsTab.none: No red flags detected for this vehicle.

related.noneFound: No related corrective actions, RCA, or inspection records found for

forecast.noPositionData: No tyre position data available. Ensure tyre records include position information.
forecast.noForecastData: No position data available for replacement forecasting.
forecast.dueSoonInterval: Due soon - based on avg replacement interval
forecast.noKmData: No km or interval data - unable to forecast
forecast.allWithinRange: All tyre positions are within acceptable health ranges.
forecast.noActionRequired: No immediate action required based on available data.
forecast.reasonCritical: Critical risk level - immediate replacement required
forecast.reasonHigh: High risk level - schedule replacement soon
forecast.reasonLowHealth: Health score critically low - tyre nearing end of life
forecast.reasonDeclining: Declining health - plan replacement within 2 months
forecast.reasonMonitor: Monitor condition - no immediate action required
forecast.insufficientCostData: Insufficient historical data to project costs. At least one month of spend history required.
